segments.paraphrased_dialogue: My chat is saying today is your day, Leslie. No, it's Juneteenth. So Juneteenth is Leslie's day?
segments.narrative_relevance: Establishes comedic lobby chemistry before the match starts.
segments.visual_description: Streamer's facecam is active. The 3D in-game avatar explores the lobby area.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: You have a skin, so you must have played this game. No, I haven't. Look at your character's hair.
segments.narrative_relevance: Builds a playful mystery surrounding Squeex's gaming history.
segments.visual_description: The avatar jumps onto a giant green play button screen in the center of the lobby.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I have hours logged on Steam, but I've genuinely never played. I know you guys played before.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex's friends tease him, suspecting he might be a secret expert.
segments.visual_description: The avatar runs and dives across the grassy field near several golf carts.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Maybe someone played on your account? Wait, QT played on mine. Ah, account sharing, GG.
segments.narrative_relevance: Resolves the mystery of Squeex's play hours.
segments.visual_description: Squeex hops into a white golf cart and drives around the lobby.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Let's go on an adventure. Are you online, Leslie? I was invisible online.
segments.narrative_relevance: Foreshadows Squeex's poor mechanical skills via driving struggles.
segments.visual_description: The golf cart flips upside down after colliding with a tree.

segments.event_name: Bronny joins and sub bet introduction
segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Bronny is here! Okay, we have a bet on the line. 10 subs to the winner, right?
segments.narrative_relevance: Introduces the central stakes (sub bet) for the mini-golf match.
segments.visual_description: Squeex abandons the flipped vehicle and drives a new cart back to the center.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: If I win, everyone gifts me 10 subs. That doesn't make any sense. But I have to win, think about it.
segments.narrative_relevance: Leslie proposes heavily biased bet terms, prompting funny arguments.
segments.visual_description: Leslie's character stands atop the giant TV screen while Squeex watches.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: If you don't win, you should gift to everyone who beats you. No, that costs way too much.
segments.narrative_relevance: The players bargain to make the competitive bet fairer.
segments.visual_description: Close-up of the giant lobby screen displaying Leslie's in-game character.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: What if we play for fun? No, don't take her day from her. It's just today is my game day.
segments.narrative_relevance: Continuation of comedic banter regarding Leslie's self-declared 'game day'.
segments.visual_description: The giant lobby screen displays a close-up of a cheerful cat character.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I found the lobby. We can play for subs. I can't gift right now, my card isn't set up.
segments.narrative_relevance: The players commit to the sub bet before starting the match.
segments.visual_description: The giant screen switches to show Squeex's custom character, making him laugh.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I just paid my estimated taxes. Was it bad? Yes, it is not friendly in New York.
segments.narrative_relevance: Spontaneous comedic chat about real-world finance during game setup.
segments.visual_description: Squeex runs his character across the field towards the hitting bays.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I had to pay a lot of taxes. My mouse isn't connecting, wait. There it is.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex tests his swing for the first time while facing technical issues.
segments.visual_description: Squeex performs a practice golf swing, sending the ball soaring.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Why are you mentioning brands? One second, I'm getting an AT&T call. Yes, I love gigabit fiber.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex executes a fake sponsor call to annoy his friends.
segments.visual_description: Squeex runs around the course collecting rotating purple question mark items.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Let's start the match. 10 subs to the winner, and we'll rotate. Let's do 18 holes.
segments.narrative_relevance: Match parameters are locked in, transition to the first hole begins.
segments.visual_description: Squeex continues running and diving on the grass field.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Players agree on a 10-sub gifting bet for the last-place finisher as Squeex asks for a restroom break.
segments.narrative_relevance: Establishes competitive stakes and a playful atmosphere before the match starts.
segments.visual_description: Players run around a starting field grabbing power-ups as Squeex's webcam is shown in the corner.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: The group announces the first hole, Sandbanks, and starts sprinting after their golf balls.
segments.narrative_relevance: Transitions the streamers into active gameplay, introducing the running mechanics.
segments.visual_description: A panoramic flyover of the Sandbanks course followed by players teeing off and sprinting.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex gets penalized and asks why. Others explain that hitting the water causes a penalty.
segments.narrative_relevance: Highlights Squeex's initial struggle with game rules and physics.
segments.visual_description: Squeex repeatedly hits his ball into the rough and water, receiving red penalty markers.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: A player explains how to aim as Squeex gets knocked over by another golfer.
segments.narrative_relevance: Shows players helping Squeex with basics while physical interference begins.
segments.visual_description: Squeex tries to aim his shot but is physically bumped and falls over on the course.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex threatens to shoot Bronny as weapons are fired in-game.
segments.narrative_relevance: Escalates physical conflict among the players through the use of weapons.
segments.visual_description: Squeex chases Bronny while wielding an elephant gun and attempting to shoot.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Streamers scream as weapons blast characters across the screen.
segments.narrative_relevance: Showcases the chaotic, weapon-heavy nature of the match preventing players from scoring.
segments.visual_description: Squeex is shot by an opponent and flies dramatically through the air onto the beach.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex complains that another player's ball blocked his shot near the hole.
segments.narrative_relevance: Demonstrates the physical interference mechanics on the putting green.
segments.visual_description: Multiple golf balls collide near the cup as characters crowd the small green.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex screams about his shot power, then successfully holes out in first place.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex achieves a surprising, dramatic first-place finish despite his confusion.
segments.visual_description: Squeex's ball drops into the cup, triggering a celebratory animation on screen.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Valkyrae and Bronny finish as Squeex questions another player's celebration.
segments.narrative_relevance: Displays the final scores for Hole 1 with Squeex in the lead.
segments.visual_description: Remaining players hole out, and a scoreboard displays the current rankings.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: The map changes to Lone Island. Squeex claims he is completely new to the game.
segments.narrative_relevance: Transitions the game to the second hole, maintaining Squeex's underdog persona.
segments.visual_description: Flyover overview of the Lone Island map followed by the player countdown.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Bronny shoots Squeex right after his first drive, sparking laughter.
segments.narrative_relevance: Shows the quick resumption of targeting against Squeex.
segments.visual_description: Squeex hits his ball, runs forward, and is instantly blasted sideways by Bronny's weapon.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Players laugh as Squeex drowns in the ocean and has to respawn.
segments.narrative_relevance: Ends the segment with Squeex struggling against the environmental hazards.
segments.visual_description: Squeex's character falls into the sea, drowns, and is airlifted back by a drone.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: You drown in the water! No, water penalty!
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex suffers a major mechanical failure, reinforcing his novice status.
segments.visual_description: A character in a black cap runs into a water hazard on a cartoon golf course.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Are you dead ass? I saw that.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex experiments with chaotic weapons to target other players.
segments.visual_description: The player fires a pistol at an opponent on a sandy beach.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Why is it going so far? Is it going in?
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex struggles with game physics and shot power.
segments.visual_description: The character aims a shot with a high trajectory line indicator.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Oh my Lord! What are the penalties?
segments.narrative_relevance: Game chaos directly disrupts Squeex's progress near the hole.
segments.visual_description: A dark explosion knocks the character flat on the green grass.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Valkyrae finished second. Common enemy!
segments.narrative_relevance: Opponents easily finish the hole while Squeex falls behind.
segments.visual_description: Other players celebrate near the flagstick while Squeex watches.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Change your angle to zero. How do I do that?
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex receives key coaching to fix his mechanical mistakes.
segments.visual_description: Squeex listens to background advice shown on his stream facecam.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Hold right-click to aim. Oh, I see it now.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex learns the aiming mechanic, initiating his gameplay breakthrough.
segments.visual_description: An overview of the 'Bullseye' island course is displayed.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: That was jokes. Nice shot.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex keeps pace with other players using his new aiming skills.
segments.visual_description: The ball flies over the water to land on a wooden island platform.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: How do you get up there? I like this game.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex gains confidence navigating the complex terrain.
segments.visual_description: The character runs up steep sand dunes past rocks and trees.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Yes! Yes! I ruined it.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex prepares his final approach to the hole.
segments.visual_description: The character stands near the green holding a landmine.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Do your best! What is happening?
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex still struggles with short-range putting controls.
segments.visual_description: The character putts repeatedly near the flag.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I got third. Leaderboard is up.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex secures a decent finish, showing score progression.
segments.visual_description: The leaderboard screen displays current player match scores.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Leslie is last. No need to mention that.
segments.narrative_relevance: The match transitions to Hole 4, offering Squeex a fresh start.
segments.visual_description: The camera displays the tropical 'Treasure Island' course layout.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Why, Bronny?! I never forgive.
segments.narrative_relevance: Active targeting of Squeex begins as Bronny disrupts his drive.
segments.visual_description: Squeex's character gets knocked down on the fairway.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: No! Squeex froze us! I froze them!
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex successfully sabotages his rivals, proving he is a major threat.
segments.visual_description: Two players are encased in large, blue translucent ice blocks.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I never forgive or forget. Oh, Bronny got frozen! You froze yourself!
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex pursues his rivals on Hole 4, using weapons to retaliate.
segments.visual_description: Streamer facecam on left. Gameplay shows Squeex running through a green course, blasting Bronny with a rocket driver.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: You froze yourself like an idiot, Squeex.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex positions himself for a long shot to secure his standing.
segments.visual_description: Squeex aims and takes a high-power swing on the grassy hill.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I will never forget! Someone shoot him!
segments.narrative_relevance: The players race to the green using golf carts to gain a speed advantage.
segments.visual_description: Squeex drives a golf cart along the water's edge to reach his ball.

segments.event_name: Race to the Flag on Hole 4
segments.paraphrased_dialogue: She is in first! No, I am not!
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex learns the utility of golf carts to navigate the terrain quickly.
segments.visual_description: Squeex drives his golf cart to the top of the hill, bypassing other players.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I learned the game! Squeex finished second!
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex finishes 2nd on Hole 4, proving his improvement.
segments.visual_description: Squeex puts the ball in and celebrates his successful second-place finish.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Oh no, I hit it so far!
segments.narrative_relevance: Valkyrae struggles, falling behind on the leaderboard while Squeex climbs.
segments.visual_description: Squeex watches on facecam as Valkyrae misses multiple putts.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I like golfing in real life. I have never done it.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex attempts to blast Valkyrae off the tee but blows himself up instead.
segments.visual_description: Squeex fires a rocket launcher at the start of Hole 5, catching himself in the blast.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I hurt myself, I couldn't help it. We must get the women.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex recovers from his self-inflicted blast and launches his first golf stroke.
segments.visual_description: Squeex takes a long shot from the sandy beach across the water.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Get out of here, bro! You are closer to me.
segments.narrative_relevance: Bronny targets Squeex with an elephant gun, slowing his progress.
segments.visual_description: Bronny shoots Squeex's character, causing him to react in frustration.

segments.event_name: The Gender War Debate on Hole 5
segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Not attacking Squeex is straight-up sexism!
segments.narrative_relevance: The female streamers humorously accuse Bronny of sexism for targeting them instead of Squeex.
segments.visual_description: Squeex takes a shot from the shoreline towards the main island.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I will go to your place and strangle you! You will suffocate!
segments.narrative_relevance: Valkyrae grows increasingly tilted by Squeex's performance.
segments.visual_description: Squeex swims in the water, laughing at Valkyrae's over-the-top threats.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Wait till next week! I am making a list of your least favorite games!
segments.narrative_relevance: Leslie threatens to retaliate by forcing Squeex to stream games he hates.
segments.visual_description: Squeex drives his golf cart through the shallow water to reach the green.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: They wouldn't betray me! CS2 aim! Rematch!
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex avoids obstacles and pushes toward the green despite sabotage.
segments.visual_description: Squeex is knocked down by an attack but gets back up to run forward.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I should make him stream Valorant. New movement tech!
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex uses an electromagnet and spring boots to gain ground near the flag.
segments.visual_description: Squeex uses power-ups to propel his character towards the final hole.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: USA won! We made the knockout stage!
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex finishes 3rd, maintaining his competitive position in the lobby.
segments.visual_description: Squeex sinks his putt and celebrates his finish while Valkyrae struggles behind him.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: We made it to the knockout stage! Go USA!
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex celebrates a strong finish on Hole 4, cementing his escape from the bottom spots.
segments.visual_description: Leaderboard scores show on-screen while Squeex reacts on his facecam.

segments.event_name: Hidden Lagoon Intro and Tee Off
segments.paraphrased_dialogue: How is that possible? I feel like I've been doing so bad.
segments.narrative_relevance: The match transitions to Hole 6, prompting Squeex to plan his next strategy.
segments.visual_description: A cinematic overview of Hidden Lagoon transitions to Squeex lining up his first shot.

segments.event_name: Squeex Gets Frozen on Hidden Lagoon
segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Who hit me from back? Oh, what a dodge!
segments.narrative_relevance: Lobby-wide targeting begins as Squeex is frozen in ice by a rival's item.
segments.visual_description: Squeex's character is suddenly encased in a giant block of ice on the fairway.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: I think I understand now.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex works to recover his positioning after the freezing penalty.
segments.visual_description: Squeex hits his ball over trees, landing on the sandy beach shoreline.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: That was not the thing I should have done.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex moves closer to the green while trying to dodge other players.
segments.visual_description: The character runs along the grassy bank, picking up item mystery boxes.

segments.event_name: Valkyrae Run Over by Golf Cart
segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Wait, how are you invisible? Oh, oh!
segments.narrative_relevance: In-game chaos erupts on the green as a golf cart runs over Valkyrae.
segments.visual_description: A player drives a golf cart directly into Valkyrae's character on the green.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: You're actually an opp. Oh my god, I'm so mad!
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex completes the hole quickly, frustrating his competitive rivals.
segments.visual_description: Squeex putts his ball into the hole while Valkyrae struggles nearby.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Can I give you a piece of advice?
segments.narrative_relevance: The lobby transitions from Hidden Lagoon to Hole 7.
segments.visual_description: Valkyrae finishes her turn, leading to the leaderboard and the Hole 7 intro card.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Valkyrae mentions fighting hard for third place. Ludwig suggests playing StarCraft, and Valkyrae notes they would all have to play.
segments.narrative_relevance: Establishes current scores and builds casual banter before the next hole.
segments.visual_description: Scoreboard is displayed showing Squeex in second place while players finish Hole 8.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: The group transitions to Hole 9. Valkyrae calls Ludwig the common enemy since he is leading.
segments.narrative_relevance: Introduces Hole 9 and highlights Ludwig's lead as the main competitive threat.
segments.visual_description: The camera pans over Hole 9 'Donut', a course with a central island.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Players launch their initial shots. Someone gets flipped and complains about it.
segments.narrative_relevance: Beginning of the fairway progression on the new hole.
segments.visual_description: Characters tee off and run across the grass toward the fairway.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex targets Valkyrae with a freeze bomb. Valkyrae expresses her annoyance.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex uses in-game items strategically to hinder his chief rival.
segments.visual_description: Squeex throws a freeze item at Valkyrae's ball, encasing it in ice.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Valkyrae shoots Squeex with a dueling pistol, laughing hysterically at the hit.
segments.narrative_relevance: Escalates the personal rivalry between Squeex and Valkyrae.
segments.visual_description: Valkyrae aims and shoots Squeex's character, sending him off-course.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex positions himself near the green and prepares for his final putt.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex bounces back from being shot to take the lead on the hole.
segments.visual_description: Squeex's character runs onto the green, aligns his putter, and hits.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex celebrates loudly, praising his own shot. Valkyrae groans in defeat.
segments.narrative_relevance: Squeex achieves a clutch first-place finish on Hole 9.
segments.visual_description: The ball sinks into the hole; Squeex cheers on his webcam overlay.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Valkyrae calls Squeex a 'siren' and 'Medusa' who distracts the lobby with his presence.
segments.narrative_relevance: Valkyrae comically attributes Squeex's success to mystical distraction.
segments.visual_description: Remaining players complete their putts while bantering over voice chat.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Squeex accepts the siren comparison. The game displays updated scores.
segments.narrative_relevance: Concludes Hole 9 with Squeex solidifying his competitive position.
segments.visual_description: The leaderboard shows Squeex maintaining second place behind Ludwig.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Streamers react to the steep incline of Hole 10, anticipating extreme difficulty.
segments.narrative_relevance: Introduces a vertical physical challenge that tests the players' mechanics.
segments.visual_description: The camera previews a steep, vertical grassy hill representing the new hole.

segments.paraphrased_dialogue: Players complain as their balls repeatedly slide back down the steep hill.
segments.narrative_relevance: Immediately humbles both Squeex and Valkyrae with physics-based struggles.
segments.visual_description: Multiple golf balls slide down the steep incline, forcing players to retry.
